entries.notes: Clean square beveled gold frame, straight edges. General dialog/panel chrome -- default pick for the #525 dock/panel shell primitive.
Ornate bracket frame with diamond side-spikes, larger insets. For emphasis surfaces (e.g. victory/defeat modal border, hero ability card) rather than everyday chrome.
Compact frame (256x256 source, smaller absolute insets than frame-panel but same proportional bevel weight) sized for action-bar-button-scale chrome.
Dark steel bezel/trough, transparent interior. Generic HP-style bar track -- pairs with bar-fill-hp or bar-fill-resource composited into the interior inset region.
Solid gold gradient fill, tapered diamond end-caps. Clip (do not stretch) to represent percentage; cap margin matches bar-track-hp's interior inset so the fill sits flush inside the bezel.

Solid silver/gray gradient fill, same shape as bar-fill-hp. For a secondary resource (stamina/spell-slots/etc.) sharing bar-track-hp so HP and the secondary resource read as the same gauge family in different colors.

Reuses the #490 action-bar rage icon path (dumbbell glyph) -- no copy. Judgment call: matches the action button rather than pulling a separate status-icon-set glyph (icons/status Status_AttackUp01 crossed-swords was the alternative); flagged for veto.
Reuses the #490 action-bar dodge icon path (shield glyph) -- no copy. Same judgment call as badge-raging: button/badge visual consistency over a distinct glyph.

Skull glyph from the #473 status-icon set. Covers both 'unconscious' and 'dying' (0 HP / death-save territory) as a single badge per the #467 checklist -- there is no separate sleep/Zzz unconscious-only glyph in the promoted set.
Generic upward-arrow glyph from the #473 status-icon set. Generic positive-effect badge, not tied to a specific buff.
Generic downward-arrow glyph from the #473 status-icon set. Generic negative-effect badge, not tied to a specific debuff.
Rank-and-file goblin portrait for enemy initiative slots.
PLACEHOLDER -- Goblin WarChief standing in for a generic 'boss' tier portrait until a dedicated boss portrait set exists. See $placeholderNote.
Warm gold ornate scrollwork title-plate frame, text-free (empty interior for app-rendered text). Judgment call -- see $judgmentCallNote.
Cold steel title-plate frame with hook/claw corner ornaments, text-free. Judgment call -- see $judgmentCallNote.
